title: Binary Search, Selection, and Boundary Finding · Execution Trace: Search Monotone Answer
summary: Locate inventory thresholds and percentiles without off-by-one failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa search monotone answer increment in a boundary-safe search and selection toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Binary-search an answer space only after proving a monotone feasibility predicate.
Find first true, last false, lower bound, and upper bound under duplicate values.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.code:
def lower_bound(values: list[int], target: int) -> int:
    low, high = 0, len(values)
    while low < high:
        middle = (low + high) // 2
        if values[middle] < target: low = middle + 1
        else: high = middle
    assert all(value < target for value in values[:low])
    return low
